query: SELECT configKey, LEFT(configValue, 20) as preview FROM platform_config WHERE configKey IN ('STRIPE_LIVE_SECRET_KEY', 'STRIPE_LIVE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY', 'STRIPE_TEST_SECRET_KEY', 'STRIPE_TEST_PUBLISHABLE_KEY', 'STRIPE_TEST_MODE', 'TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID') ORDER BY configKey;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT configKey, LEFT(configValue, 20) as preview FROM platform_config WHERE configKey IN ('STRIPE_LIVE_SECRET_KEY', 'STRIPE_LIVE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY', 'STRIPE_TEST_SECRET_KEY', 'STRIPE_TEST_PUBLISHABLE_KEY', 'STRIPE_TEST_MODE', 'TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID') ORDER BY configKey;
